reasoning: A well-constructed timing-based CBC padding oracle with genuine multi-layer complexity: HMAC signature gating (requiring reverse-engineering of derive_internal_token), non-standard ISO/IEC 9797-1 Method 2 padding (preventing copy-paste PKCS7 exploits), and an internal JSON+SHA-256 checksum layer. Flag isolation is excellent (build-time encryption, file deletion, privilege drop). The timing oracle via 480k SHA-384 iterations is more sophisticated than error-based oracles, though the challenge description incorrectly claims distinct error codes (ERR_SIGNAL_DISTORTION/ERR_INTEGRITY_COMPROMISED) when the code actually returns a single 'SIGNAL_LOST' for all failures — the real oracle is purely timing-based. Appropriate for difficulty 2.0; the HMAC barrier plus non-standard padding adaptation lifts this above a textbook padding oracle.
